fields.Description: Our winter fleece neck scarf is crafted from high - quality polyester, a soft, comfortable, and skin - friendly material. It effectively blocks cold wind, offering warmth to your face and neck. With a unique design, it can double as a mask, covering the mouth, nose, and face to block cold air, dust, and pollutants. Or use it as a neck cover to prevent cold wind from entering through the collar. The elastic material fits different head and neck circumferences without feeling tight. Ideal for outdoor sports like cycling and skiing, or daily commuting. It also makes a great gift. Rush service is available.

Imprint_Location.text: Centered on Front or as you request

fields.产品名称: Winter fleece soft warm outdoor thickened mask neck scarf
fields.完整描述: Our warm neck cover is made of high-quality warm material, soft, comfortable and skin-friendly, which can effectively block cold wind and provide warm protection for your face and neck. The unique design can be used as a mask, covering the mouth, nose and face, blocking the invasion of cold air, while reducing the inhalation of dust and pollutants. It can also be used as a neck cover, wrapped around the neck to prevent cold wind from entering through the collar. The elastic material is suitable for different people's head circumference and neck circumference, and will not produce a tight feeling. Whether it is outdoor sports, cycling, skiing, or daily commuting, the warm neck cover is your ideal choice. It is also a thoughtful gift for family or friends.
fields.简要说明: This thickened warm neck scarf can effectively block wind and provide warmth to your face and neck.Rush service is provided.
